use_codes.desc: METHOD OF PERFORMING NMR IMAGING WITH A PATIENT COMPRISING ADMINISTERING TO THE PATIENT AN EFFECTIVE AMOUNT OF CONTRAST AGENT DISCLOSED IN THE CLAIMS

IMAGING A BODY TISSUE AND SUBJECTING TO NMR TOMOGRAPHY, ADMINISTERING AN AMOUNT OF PHARMACEUTICAL AGENT FOR AFFECTING THE RELAXATION TIMES OF ATOMS IN BODY TISSUES UNDERGOING NMR DIAGNOSIS, WHEREBY THE IMAGE CONTRAST IN ENHANCED....
